attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.MANUFACTURER_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.MFG_PART_NUM, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.MRP_PLANNING_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.DESCRIPTION, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.START_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.END_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.FIRST_ARTICLE_STATUS, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.APPROVAL_STATUS, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS,
 (
 select MANUFACTURER_ID ,MFG_PART_NUM ,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID ,ORGANIZATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS
 minus
 select MANUFACTURER_ID ,MFG_PART_NUM ,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID ,ORGANIZATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.MANUFACTURER_ID = STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.MANUFACTURER_ID and ACM.MFG_PART_NUM=STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.MFG_PART_NUM and ACM.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID=STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID and ACM.ORGANIZATION_ID=STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.ORGANIZATION_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_MTL_MFG_PART_NUMBERS.REFRESH_DATETIME
